similar_questions.title: Minimum Costs Using the Train Line

discussion_posts.name: knotri
discussion_posts.content: tips, find distance to move whole circle, then find distance to move one way. To move other way u can subtract one way distance from whole circle

discussion_posts.name: Anitkrun
discussion_posts.content: distance between (a,b) = distance between(b,a). Very obvious thing but simplifies the traversal.

discussion_posts.name: mageshsrinivasulu
discussion_posts.content: Brain got cooked trying to solve this problem

discussion_posts.name: user9473N
discussion_posts.content: it looks easy but so tough,  I tried using DFS but felt it difficult.

discussion_posts.name: p13rr0t
discussion_posts.content: start does not necessarily comes "earlier" than destination

discussion_posts.name: Chris1337
discussion_posts.content:
This should have been a graph easy.

Tips:
- Compute distance going from start to destination going forward through the array.
- Compute distance going from start to destination going forward through the array.
- Account for when i meets 0 for both going forwards in backwards(make the array loop).

Good luck Gentlemen

discussion_posts.name: edl73GizlJ
discussion_posts.content: You don\'t need knowledge of graphs for this problem, since the connections are all circular, each having 2 neighbours.
